summary: The diff implements REQ-2 (user-friendly error message with Retry button) fully in the frontend. REQ-1 (redeploying the backend canister to a running state) shows backend/main.mo was modified, but there is no evidence of actual canister deployment commands, dfx.json changes, or deployment scripts that would restart the stopped canister.

missing_requirements.requirement: Redeploy the backend canister (3m4vr-hiaaa-aaaac-ba7sa-cai) so it is running and can handle query calls, restoring it to a started state without data loss.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff only shows modifications to backend/main.mo (source code changes) but contains no deployment scripts, dfx.json updates, CI/CD pipeline changes, or any other artifact that would actually deploy/start the canister on the IC network. Modifying main.mo alone does not redeploy or restart a stopped canister.
